description*.en: "Long-Range Order Parameter" is the fraction of atoms in an Ising ferromagnet having magnetic moments in one direction, minus the fraction having magnetic moments in the opposite direction.

title: LongRangeOrderParameter
description: "Long-Range Order Parameter" is the fraction of atoms in an Ising ferromagnet having magnetic moments in one direction, minus the fraction having magnetic moments in the opposite direction.
